title: Digital Realty Trust: Unexciting But Still A Buy
text: Data centers are expected to experience serious tailwinds over the rest of the decade fueled by double-digit growth in demand for computing power. Digital Realty Trust should be at the forefront of this trend, but recent results have hardly been exciting. Growth has slowed and is not expected to pick up any time soon.

title: Digital Realty: A Leveraged, Pricey But Promising Specialized REIT
text: Digital Realty is a global leader in data center solutions, serving various customers, including cloud service providers, IT and network service providers, and enterprises across multiple continents. Digital Realty has shifted from wholesale to versatile colocation data center provider, serving a wider range of clients with diverse space, power, and connection needs.

title: Digital Realty Trust Crosses Above 5% Yield Territory

title: Failure Fallout
text: U.S. equity markets tumbled this week after the sudden collapse of a pair of technology-focused banks sparked concerns over financial stability and overshadowed a generally solid slate of employment data. Effectively erasing all of its gains for the year and posting its worst week since September 2022, the S&P 500 dipped 4.5% while the Mid-Cap and Small-Cap benchmarks plunged 7%.

title: The Near-Perfect Portfolio: Sleep Well During Turbulent Times
text: The stock market is inherently volatile. With the economy going through the boom and bust cycles more frequently, the extreme ups and downs of the market are inevitable. For most conservative investors, especially retirees, it's very difficult to tolerate large and deep drawdowns. However, it is almost impossible to avoid these issues with index investing.
